rationale: The cited paper appears highly topically aligned with the citing paper’s stated prior-work base: both center on ex ante contract design and ex post monitoring/governance consequences in channel relationships (e.g., contractual completeness/specificity, monitoring, and downstream behavior/cost outcomes). The citing note says it extends interfirm monitoring and contract-misalignment research, and this 2012 JMR study is a plausible mechanism/foundation source for that extension, so it is not safe to treat as an obvious incidental mention.
